programme.title: The Forest Makers Of The Mata Atlantica
programme.desc: An NGO has been planting araucaria trees for 40 years to protect Brazil's Atlantic rainforest. In India, the AI boom is leading to increasing conflicts over water supply.

programme.title: How The Martial Art Khomlainai Brings Bodo And Santhal Communities Together
programme.desc: In Assam, decades of conflict kept Bodo and Santhal communities apart. Now the traditional martial art Khomlainai is bringing children together, who have never spoken or played with each other before. Mejing Narzary, a former Bodo underground fighter, and Khermu Karmakar, a former general of the Santhal insurgent force, have achieved this miracle.

programme.title: Facial Recognition: Helpful Or Controlling?
programme.desc: Facial recognition is now part of daily life - unlocking phones, verifying identities, and helping law enforcement. But in government hands, it can become a serious threat to privacy and civil liberties.

programme.title: Novel Ways To Power Environmental Change In Africa
programme.desc: Youth humor to fight fossil fuels, solar grandmas in Ghana; bamboo to save homes from landslides and sacred sites protecting biotopes in Uganda.

programme.title: How The Martial Art Khomlainai Brings Bodo And Santhal Communities Together

programme.title: Novel Ways To Power Environmental Change In Africa
programme.desc: Youth humor to fight fossil fuels, solar grandmas in Ghana; bamboo to save homes from landslides and sacred sites protecting biotopes in Uganda.

programme.title: The Forest Makers Of The Mata Atlantica

programme.title: The Business Case For Space - And Which Country Will Get There First?
programme.desc: The world spent E106 billion on space in 2023 - more than the GDP of most countries. Critics call it a vanity project. Supporters point to trillion-dollar spinoffs like GPS and satellite navigation that quietly power everything from Uber to global banking. So, who's right? We dig into the numbers and challenge the hype around lunar mining.

programme.title: When Mudslides Threaten Mountain Villages
programme.desc: In the Alps, villages are increasingly threatened by flows of mud and debris. The problem reached new heights in 2025, when the Swiss mountain village of Blatten was nearly completely buried by a huge avalanche.

programme.desc: Tim and Tommy try to grow the biggest Moon Pumpkin they can.

programme.desc: Tim and Tommy help out at the DinerStore.

programme.desc: While the playground is getting rebuilt, Daddy Pig teaches the children some Simple Science!

programme.title: E711 - Easter Bunny

programme.desc: Rubble & Crew work together to transform Builder Cove's beach boardwalk into a bright, festive winter wonderland.

programme.title: E408 - T-Rex Trouble
programme.desc: Blaze and Zeg are in Dinosaur Valley, showing off their amazing robot powers to their dinosaur friends. But when they discover three lost little Tyrannosauruses, they must use their robot powers to get the babies home safely.

programme.title: E102 - Present / Movie / Vinny

programme.title: E206 - Tickets
programme.desc: Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket.

programme.desc: Peppa and George are painting. Daddy shows them how to mix paints and the three of them paint a beautiful picture of a cherry tree. Everything is going very well, until the ducks turn up and decide to run through the paint and all over the painting.

programme.title: E223 - Granddad Dog's Garage

programme.title: E761
programme.desc: Sayali desires a fairytale romance, but fate intertwines her with Sachin, a complex figure. Will her dreams of a perfect life survive this unexpected connection?

programme.title: Magnificent Mucus
programme.desc: The doctors reveal the power of mighty mucus in keeping bacteria and air particles out of your airways. In the emergency department, Maisie has a bead stuck up her nose!

programme.title: The Colour of Heat
programme.desc: Eric learns that wearing light colours in the sun keeps you cooler than dark colours. He does an ice cube experiment to how lighter colours reflect light and heat, just like a mirror.

programme.title: Fascinating Fossils
programme.desc: Were all dinosaurs reptiles? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of palaeontology. Have hands-on fun by creating a dinosaur egg, and get to know Teuku Jacob, who used fossils and remains to study the origins and predecessors of present human species.

programme.title: Victor Mystery
programme.desc: Max thinks Take Your Child To Work Day is going to be boring, until he comes across alarming evidence that his father is actually a top-secret operative with amazing equipment and powers.

programme.title: Think Pink
programme.desc: Anabella loves all things pink. She even invented a holiday- Pink day! When her friends aren't excited to celebrate, her feelings are hurt. To make it up to Anabella, the gang decides to move the festivities to Lac Rose in Senegal – a pink lake! Why is the lake pink?

programme.title: Doki and Ducki
programme.desc: Doki stumbles upon a newly hatched duckling. To Doki's surprise, the duckling follows him! It seems like ‘Ducki' has mistakenly imprinted on Doki and thinks he's his mama! To set things right, half the team heads off to search lake Weewannanoh for the mother.

programme.title: Magnificent Mucus
programme.desc: The doctors reveal the power of mighty mucus in keeping bacteria and air particles out of your airways. In the emergency department, Maisie has a bead stuck up her nose!

programme.title: The Colour of Heat
programme.desc: Eric learns that wearing light colours in the sun keeps you cooler than dark colours. He does an ice cube experiment to how lighter colours reflect light and heat, just like a mirror.

programme.title: Finn Comes Aboard
programme.desc: Smiling Finn asks the Nektons for help to stop his father, Captain Hammerhead, from stealing a treasure that will destroy his family.

programme.title: Rhinovirus Attack!
programme.desc: The doctors become pesky viruses, but can they beat the body defenders? And we're off to Australia to check in on the Flying Doctors.

programme.title: It's a Bird! It's a Fish! It's a Metamorphosis!
programme.desc: In this episode mathemagician Eric turns a bird turn into a fish! In order to understand his shape- shifting trick, we learn all about Escher's metamorphosis: the illusion of one animal slowly transforming into another, line by line.

programme.title: ColourXplosion
programme.desc: Eric learns that if you want to create different paint colours, all you have to do is mix your paints. As long as you have the primary colours – red, blue, and yellow – you can create lots of new shades.

programme.title: It's Gala Day
programme.desc: It's the day of the gala. As the crowds arrive, there's drama backstage. Will Ella fix her costume in time for her big debut with Adriano? Will Kloe keep her nerves under control and nail her Hungarian performance? A surprising performance leaves everyone speechless.

programme.title: Lambert's Bay Bird Island - Where The Birds Are In Charge
programme.desc: The team travels a barren coastline to find Bird Island. They discover how the sandy beach is used by some highly adapted creatures and learn about the most dangerous animal on the planet. They explore the rocky shore and get to taste some very unusual seafood.

programme.title: The Hottentots Holland Mountains - Crossing The Mountains
programme.desc: When travelling through the Hottentots Holland Mountains, the team finds an ancient ocean ox wagon trail blazed by the first European settlers almost four centuries ago. On the mountain they locate a unique plant kingdom with species found nowhere else in the world.

programme.title: Superchutes!
programme.desc: Eric makes a parachute that will slow down a falling egg just enough so it doesn't get smashed when it hits the ground. But first he experiments to figure out the best parachute size. He discovers that NASA also use parachutes to drop robotic probes on to the moon.

programme.title: The Mysterious Bleeps and Bloops
programme.desc: When a highly advanced computer is loaned to Ayrton Park Public School, mysterious cyber events begin happening around town and Addison wonders if the occurrences could be part of a world-wide-web... of mystery!

programme.title: Chasing Unicorns
programme.desc: The team is asked to go and check on some radio-tagged wildlife – unicorns to be precise! Everyone wants to know if unicorns are real. They set off to the Canadian Arctic, using a tracking beacon to find the mysterious creatures.

programme.title: Seashell
programme.desc: Bring the beach closer to you with these DIY activities!

programme.title: The Treasure of Yoko Park
programme.desc: The kids discover treasure all around them when they investigate a magical pirate map!

programme.title: The Mysterious Stone
programme.desc: Fear and confusion spread when a huge stone turns up in Hilltown. Sprinter has to unravel the mystery before panic tears the town apart. No supervillain is behind this. Instead, the black stone unites Bhilkans against a common enemy.

programme.title: The Spring
programme.desc: The well in the woods needs cleaning and protection from an unknown vandal.

programme.title: Art of the Steal
programme.desc: Anabella is taking a special art class at an art museum. She manages to produce a near perfect copy of The Starry Night, by Vincent Van Gogh. But soon after the end of the class, a masterpiece goes missing. How can the team prove that Anabella is innocent?

programme.title: Bouncing and Bending Light
programme.desc: What is the difference between reflection and refraction? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of light. Have hands-on fun by mixing oil and water, and get to know Zhang Heng, a great polymath, who figured out the Moon reflects light like a mirror.

programme.title: Art of the Steal
programme.desc: Anabella is taking a special art class at an art museum. She manages to produce a near perfect copy of The Starry Night, by Vincent Van Gogh. But soon after the end of the class, a masterpiece goes missing. How can the team prove that Anabella is innocent?

programme.title: The Spring
programme.desc: The well in the woods needs cleaning and protection from an unknown vandal.

programme.title: Heni's Chicken Coop
programme.desc: When Heni's new chickens take over her garden, Darwin and Newts come up with a plan to keep everyone happy.

programme.title: Doki Digs to China
programme.desc: Oto builds a tunnel-boring machine. Doki suggests they find out if what his grandma used to say is true: can we really dig a tunel to China? The boys set off on a journey to bore right into the Earth's crust, while the girls race them to Beijing, China in the plane.

programme.title: #StudentAstronaut Contest: Russia
programme.desc: Host Emily Calandrelli holds the fourth annual #StudentAstronaut Contest. One lucky student wins a trip to Russia to train like a cosmonaut at the Yuri Gagarin Cosmonaut Training Center.

programme.title: The Survivor (Bear Grylls) and The Boss (Ursula Burns)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary, Bear Grylls shares his story of perseverance and how he became 'the world's best known survival expert', while Ursula Burns reflects on her journey to becoming the first Black woman CEO of a Fortune 500 company.

programme.title: Wind Beneath Your Wings
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make the perfect paper plane using symmetry. He finds out that real planes use the same principle as paper planes – when the fins point up and air hits them at high speed, the front of the plane is pushed up and the plane rises.

programme.title: Beware the Sentinels
programme.desc: A mysterious, ancient temple beneath the sea has been hidden for centuries. The Nektons discover there is a very good reason for that.

programme.title: Another Busy Day
programme.desc: The Junior Vets are removing a big lump from a dog's spleen, helping a cow give birth, and chasing down super-speedy birds at a theme park.

programme.title: Darwin and Newts Go Flat Out
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts have a fun but fair football game after discovering that their football pitch is tilted and figuring out how to fix it.

programme.title: The Colour of Heat
programme.desc: Eric learns that wearing light colours in the sun keeps you cooler than dark colours. He does an ice cube experiment to how lighter colours reflect light and heat, just like a mirror.

programme.title: The Survivor (Bear Grylls) and The Boss (Ursula Burns)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary, Bear Grylls shares his story of perseverance and how he became 'the world's best known survival expert', while Ursula Burns reflects on her journey to becoming the first Black woman CEO of a Fortune 500 company.

programme.title: E29 - A. The Pony/The Storm/The Dream/The Sidekick/The Hero
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin race home to spend quality time with Anais, but every likely obstacle gets in way... and some unlikely ones too!

programme.title: E103 - Extra, So Extra
programme.desc: Babs realizes Acme Loo’s school paper has closed so she starts a new one with her pal Sweetie. But when Plucky starts a gossipy tabloid to compete against them, which paper will come out on top?

programme.title: E2 - The Magical Box/Bears And The Beanstalk/Boo-Dunnit/The Little Mer-Bear/Modern-Ish Sto
programme.desc: Three baby bear brothers are granted a magical box that can transport them to any place in the universe.

programme.title: E19 - Duel At The Corn Field/Cancan Loves The Swing
programme.desc: The Bobobobobone is somewhere in the corn field. It seems like an endless search, but luckily, it’s found without much trouble. Deca starts attacking Shiro with a machine.

programme.title: E66 - Busted Cart/Dead At Eight
programme.desc: After doing a round of 'extreme carting', Mordecai and Rigby accidentally crash the cart into a tree. Mr. Maellard tells Benson that he has to drive the cart to the dealership or he will be fired.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: News[Live]
programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: The Debate
programme.desc: Live debate show on the key topic of the day with four guests from different spots of the globe, from Monday to Thursday. Keep up with up-to-date issues from all over the world in politics, culture, sports, economy and healthcare. Get the latest facts and expert opinions about the most essential stories happening around us and draw your own conclusions. The show is well known for its dynamics due to live debates with its various guests.

programme.title: Truth Or Fake[Live]
programme.desc: In our fast-moving challenging world it is of fundamental importance to sort what's true from what's fake online. programme.title: Arts24
programme.desc: Culture news from the world's art, food, and fashion capital, Paris, bringing you the latest trends, exhibitions, culinary innovations, and style movements that continue to shape global taste and creativity.

programme.title: E10 - 「情歌」專場來襲
programme.desc: 首檔原創音樂創演節目，邀請了薛之謙、張靚穎、周深、單依純、黃子弘凡等歌手，同時更邀請小柯、方文山、黃國倫等樂壇前輩和眾多新生代原創音樂人加盟；由歌曲爭奪戰、首演舞台兩大核心環節組成，用一場歌手與歌曲的奇遇，為他們提供一個自由共創的舞台，打造華語樂壇新的高光時刻。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: E2 - 球團長城感人合唱
programme.desc: 由劉宇寧、龔俊、孫紅雷、李乃文、陳赫、陳星旭、王玉雯、歐陽娣娣組成爆笑「地球團」，沿著地球脈絡從中國出發，感受北緯40度的煙火氣，通過遊戲任務解鎖各地文化與美食，用新鮮有趣的方式，探索全世界的同頻快樂。

programme.title: E51
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E44
programme.desc: 突破傳統的交友方式，24位單身女生以亮燈和滅燈方式來決定男嘉賓去留，通過「愛之初體驗」、「愛之再判斷」、「愛之終決選」、「男生權利」等決定男女嘉賓的速配成功。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: E10 - 戶外闖關選人挑戰
programme.desc: 蘇有朋、薛之謙、王嘉爾、周筆暢、胡彥斌、歐陽娜娜等明星作為音浪召集人，他們將與300位合夥人組成3組音浪團，在24小時內緊急排練，一起完成創意十足的音樂SHOW。

programme.title: E2 - 球團長城感人合唱
programme.desc: 由劉宇寧、龔俊、孫紅雷、李乃文、陳赫、陳星旭、王玉雯、歐陽娣娣組成爆笑「地球團」，沿著地球脈絡從中國出發，感受北緯40度的煙火氣，通過遊戲任務解鎖各地文化與美食，用新鮮有趣的方式，探索全世界的同頻快樂。

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: E1 - Crazy Competitions & Robot Malfunctions!
programme.desc: It's a day of crazy competitions & robot malfunctions! First, a friendly competition in the park turns into a wild go-kart race between Arpo & his rival, Nannybot! Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire. A toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably all over the backyard, & a malfunctioning birthday present massage chair chases him & Daniel around the house! From boomerang target practice to a building block showdown, the chaos never stops!

programme.title: E1 - Learning Colors, Shapes & Numbers!
programme.desc: It's time to learn all about colors, shapes & numbers with Twinkle! First, learn how to count with Twinkle as she finds five balloons in the colors red, blue, green, yellow & purple! Then, join Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to make sandcastles, learning different shapes like squares, triangles & circles. The learning continues as Twinkle & her friends build & count a beautiful tower of rainbow stones & discover the variety of shapes that clouds can take in the sky!

programme.title: E5 - Twinkle Bedtime Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E2 - Learning How to Be a Good Friend!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns how to be a good friend! When a new, shy student named Ash the firetruck joins the school, Buster sees he's all alone & invites him to play. Then, Buster learns another important lesson when he starts to lose a game of snakes & ladders & decides to cheat. From learning that sports aren't all about winning to standing up for his friends during a sleepover, Buster is on his way to being the best friend ever!

programme.title: E4 - JJ's Guide to Staying Healthy!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a guide to staying healthy & happy! The learning starts with hygiene, as JJ & his friends learn the importance of washing their hands & how to scrub-a-dub-dub in the bath. Then, it's time for some big milestones! Sing along as JJ learns to use the potty & TomTom learns what happens when you lose a tooth. Plus, join the Melon Patch kids as they visit the doctor for a checkup & learn that it's nothing to be afraid of!

programme.title: E1 - Stopping Weasel's Wacky Schemes!
programme.desc: Gecko is busy stopping Mr. Weasel's wacky schemes! First, Gecko & Weasel face off in a football match, but Weasel starts cheating! Gecko must fix his damaged teammates & teach Weasel a lesson. Then, Bobby the Bus's battery goes missing, & all clues point to Weasel! The schemes continue as Weasel tries to show off at a 'fix up fair' but needs rescuing, & he steals cakes from a bake sale but ends up crashing!

programme.title: E3 - Sky High & Super Fun Adventures
programme.desc: Get ready for sky-high & super fun adventures with JJ & his friends! First, Astronauts JJ & Mimi blast off into space, soaring past stars & planets before landing on the moon for a cheesy snack! When Boba loses his special balloon, the friends set off in a hot air balloon craft for a chase of a lifetime. The action continues as JJ & Wally train to be firefighters, but Wally's goofing around turns him into the one who needs saving!

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: Five contestants will get a personal Jamie Oliver masterclass as they try to ‘Keep Up with Jamie'. There's no recipe, only the ability to watch Jamie like a hawk to recreate an Oliver family recipe.

programme.title: E21 - Beyond The Readings: Feeding The Soul
programme.desc: Downtime is very rare in the life of Theresa Caputo. In this episode, Theresa nurtures her soul by cherishing moments with family and prioritizing self-care, all while graciously channeling spirit.

programme.title: E30 - Fastest Arroz Con Pollo
programme.desc: Arroz con pollo, or chicken and rice, is a traditional Latin American dish loved by millions worldwide. Rachael shows you how to make it quickly and easily so that it becomes a household staple.

programme.desc: Downtime is very rare in the life of Theresa Caputo. In this episode, Theresa nurtures her soul by cherishing moments with family and prioritizing self-care, all while graciously channeling spirit.

programme.desc: Arroz con pollo, or chicken and rice, is a traditional Latin American dish loved by millions worldwide. Rachael shows you how to make it quickly and easily so that it becomes a household staple.

programme.title: Abducted At An Hbcu: A Black Girl Missing Movie
programme.desc: When ambitious college student Shannon disappears due to financial struggles, her counselor Ellen discovers a trafficking ring targeting students like her and must fight to rescue Shannon.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: Five contestants will get a personal Jamie Oliver masterclass as they try to ‘Keep Up with Jamie'. There's no recipe, only the ability to watch Jamie like a hawk to recreate an Oliver family recipe.

programme.title: E30 - Fastest Arroz Con Pollo
programme.desc: Arroz con pollo, or chicken and rice, is a traditional Latin American dish loved by millions worldwide. Rachael shows you how to make it quickly and easily so that it becomes a household staple.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: As more people are enjoying leisure activities and hobbies at home, the trend of 'home entertainment' is gaining popularity. The homes we're featuring today are all about emphasising home entertainment!

programme.title: Look For A Star
programme.desc: It's hardly a coincidence that Sam is considered the most eligible bachelor in town. Not only is he a young, smart, and insightful entrepreneur with a coveted fortune, but he also happens to be a blithe spirit with a carefree attitude to life. However, every success has its price. Sam has already divorced three times and finds himself crawling back to the game of love sooner than he has expected. It is love at first sight when Sam chances upon a feisty, fast-talking woman with the odd name of Milan at a Macau casino. But the catch is, she is a part-time poker dealer and a full-time cabaret dancer, “careers” not exactly congruent with his station in life. Fallen in love against all odds, this mismatched couple soon makes headline in all media which turn Milan into an It girl overnight...

programme.title: Seven Swords
programme.desc: In the early 1660's the Manchurians took over the sovereignty of China and established the Qing Dynasty. With many pro-nationalist revolts occurring, the newly set-up government immediately imposed a ban on the study and practice of the Martial Arts. Fire-wind, a military official from the previous dynasty, ravages and ranges across North-western China with his next goal to attack the final frontier - the intransigent and hold-out town know as the Martial Village. Fu Qinghu, a retired executioner from the previous dynasty, feels a moral obligation to try and put a stop to this brutality and decides to save Martial Village. He convinces two young people from the village to travel with him to Mount Heaven in order to seek help from Master Shadow-Glow, a hermit who is a master of swords and leads a group of disciples with unimaginable swordsmanship...

programme.title: Project Silence
programme.desc: Due to sudden deteriorating weather conditions, visibility on the Airport Bridge is severely impaired, leaving people stranded and at risk of the bridge collapsing due to a series of chain collisions and explosions. Amidst the chaos, the canine subjects 'Echo' from the military experiment 'Project Silence,' who were being transported in secret, break free, and all human survivors become targets of relentless attacks. Various individuals find themselves stranded on the Airport Bridge for different reasons - a government official from the presidential office who was seeing off his daughter at the airport; a tow truck driver who was on his way to a multi-collision scene; an elderly who were returning from a trip abroad; sisters who missed their flights, and Dr. Yang, the researcher responsible for Project Silence - and a desperate struggle begins for them to escape to safety.

programme.title: Integrity
programme.desc: The multi-year ICAC investigation into the Lida Conglomerate is on the brink of collapse after the CEO's disappearance and the whistleblower's fleeing to Australia. To salvage the case, a top ICAC agent teams with a fellow investigator (who happens to be his estranged wife) and risks their lives to bring the witness back to Hong Kong.

programme.title: Broker
programme.desc: 'Sanghyeon' is always struggling from debt, and 'Dongsu' works at a baby box facility. On a rainy night, they steal the baby 'Woosung,' who was left in the baby box, to sell him at a good price. Meanwhile, detectives were watching, and they quietly track them down to capture the crucial evidence.

programme.title: Showbiz Spy
programme.desc: Cercis Lui goes undercover in this lively comedy as an officer of the 'International Association for the Physical and Mental Health Development of Underage Boys and Girls” dedicated to protecting young boys and girls from being exploited in their pursuit of pop stardom. When tasked with taking down a shady talent show and its mastermind, Big Boss, Cercis must disguise himself as a woman to enter the competition. Only then can he get close enough to gather the evidence to take down the criminal ring. Joining this outlandish operation are Helianthus - an entertainment reporter, Circle O – a wannabe popstar, Lilium - a notorious artist and Oval O – cousin of Circle O from the US. But does this ragtag team have what it takes to triumph over the shady side of the business?

programme.title: Best Supporting Actors: Mad World
programme.desc: The film begins with an old man who has long been absent as a father, picking up his son, who is suffering from bipolar disorder, from a mental hospital. Both men are in deep remorse for the accident that caused the death of the mother. The tension and anxiety boil as they stay with each other in a tiny subdivided flat. As time passes, they realize the pain between one another is not the only confrontation that awaits them; but to face the cruel world that they are living in.

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: Shivaay learns Baldev has sent a court notice demanding fifty lakhs within a week to reclaim their house. Undeterred, Shivaay boldly challenges Baldev's arrogance.

programme.title: E308
programme.desc: Noyontara talks to ghosts and is mocked for it. Her world flips after marrying Surjo, a man who trusts only science, leading to spooky twists and emotional surprises.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: A couple searches for the perfect wedding outfits, facing many trials, choices, and doubts as they hope to find something that truly makes them both happy.

programme.title: E710
programme.desc: Mangal switches Aarav's suitcase and calls Ishana to clear her misunderstanding. Meanwhile, Saumya grows suspicious when Aarav appears to carry fake currency.

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: Shivaay reaches the police to recover money from a digital scam by catching Buntu. Pallavi reassures Aadhya, trusting Shivaay's genuine love for her.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day's session.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition

With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day's session.

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: It's one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. Steve Sedgwick, Karen Tso and Julianna Tatelbaum take on the most complex stories of the day with instant analysis on how you can make your money work around the news.

programme.title: Morning Call
programme.desc: Morning Call, anchored by Morgan Brennan, delivers the essential market intelligence that drives the trading day ahead. The program captures breaking business news as it unfolds and tracks pre market equity moves, commodity swings, U.S. futures, and overnight action across global markets.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Squawk On The Street
programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, “Squawk On The Street” tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: E39 - Dragon Boat Beats
programme.desc: The Supermarket is frozen over and Supertato, Carrot, Broccoli and Tomato practice for the boat race by using chopsticks for oars, but it doesn't go well as they're out of sync with each other.

programme.title: E6 - The Why Badge
programme.desc: Why do my feet hurt?', Tag asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: E6 - Peas
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have fun looking for peas with the Playtimers in their Pea Party game.

programme.title: E12 - The Teamwork Badge
programme.desc: A box full of bits and pieces is delivered to the Clubhouse and the Squirrels are excited. Duggee and the Squirrels are going to have to work hard to put it all together. Time for a bit of teamwork.

programme.title: E11 - The Pottery Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is having a lovely cup of tea in his favourite cup when Roly surprises him with a very loud peek-a-boo! It is so loud that Duggee jumps and drops his cup which shatters into pieces.

programme.title: E8 - Batucada
programme.desc: While working on the Brazilian Railway, Thomas and Gabriela get ready for the Batucada carnival at the docks.

programme.title: E8 - Bags Of Bags
programme.desc: Scarf Lady has misplaced Bag in the Big Shop, so Sarah and Duck help with the search.

programme.title: E25 - Delivery
programme.desc: Stanley helps Hattie, Fred, and Fifi with a new food delivery service. It starts well, except with each delivery a problem arises. Stanley must solve them before Myrtle's party.

programme.title: E9 - I Don't Like Bananas
programme.desc: From broccoli soup to cheeseburgers and blue cheese, the funny animals chat about the best and worst things to eat.

programme.title: E35 - Smoochy Kiss
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.title: E36 - Dirt
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: E40 - The Wedding Badge
programme.desc: King Tiger has met his perfect partner and he is getting married. It's going to be a royal wedding!! The squirrels are to be special Guests of Honour, but who is King Tiger marrying!?

programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: Hong Kong Graffiti
programme.desc: There was a kid who used to serve with his father in a night club‘s washroom. By chance, he became a singer and turned into the hottest star in the club. His teacher however, fell from his golden days. As the teacher realized that “Nothing Lasts Forever”, he was content with his quiet and simple life. The story took place in a night club in the sixties. Zhang Jiawing was a cheerful kid. His best friend Gao Zhi was a shoe boy. Gao‘s father disappeared after losing all his money in stock speculation. The two kids became students to the once renowned singer Johnny, whose career was at low ebb. Johnny had great hopes on them. He vowed to make them become the best of the best...

programme.title: Legendary Award Winners: Bullet In The Head
programme.desc: In 1967, Hong Kong, Ben, Paul, and Frank are childhood friends and members of a gang. They regularly brawl with members of other gangs...

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E1 - Giants on the Move
programme.desc: Something is moving through Germany: machines weighing tons on wheels. In Bavaria, huge mobile cranes lift entire bridges in the middle of motorway traffic. In North Rhine-Westphalia, a heavy transport vehicle rolls through narrow villages. In Augsburg, the steel of a crane bends under 10-ton loads. Crane work with millimetre precision, overcoming obstacles on the route and constant time pressure demand the highest concentration and nerves of steel from the transport experts.

programme.title: E2 - Tom Arnold
programme.desc: World-renowned survivalist Bear Grylls takes Tom Arnold (Sons of Anarchy (2008)) through the unpredictable coastal mountains of Oregon, taking on steep terrain, river crossings and oceanside cliffs. Arnold attempts to channel the courage and determination from his weight-loss struggle in order to tackle a journey that takes him to the brink of mental and physical exhaustion.

programme.title: E3 - Girona
programme.desc: Jack learns how to cook the old-fashioned, classic British jellied eels dish. Although it was once an extremely popular meal in Britain, will the Spanish locals like it too?

programme.title: E1 - The Big Deal
programme.desc: Claudia’s season starts off with a bang when she receives a $250,000 jade order, but things quickly turn sour when her crew questions if they have a big enough boulder to complete the sale.

programme.title: E2 - The Last Laugh
programme.desc: After years of getting the raw end of the deal with Scrappy Larry, Robin pulls a prank on his old buddy, but the fun and games end when Claudia’s buyer makes an unexpected request.

programme.title: E3 - Down to the Wire
programme.desc: Under pressure to meet their buyer’s tight deadline, Robin and Josh clash when they run into endless problems setting up the wire saw.

programme.title: E6 - Hurricane Lester
programme.desc: A Houston area school teacher, who lost almost everything in Hurricane Harvey, sets out with Bear Grylls to face a different side of Mother Nature. Along the way, Lester is put to the test, but proves that no challenge is too tough for his unbreakable spirit.

programme.title: E5 - Missing Home
programme.desc: Sarah visits the laundry district of Dhobi Ghat, one of the world's largest outdoor laundries. Further setbacks at the restaurant and the furious pace of Mumbai are beginning to wear Sarah down as the opening night gets closer.

programme.title: ATP 26 Fayez Sarofim & Co. U.S. Men's Clay Court Championship -SF (1)
ATP 26 Fayez Sarofim & Co. U.S. Men's Clay Court Championship -SF (2)
E6 - Thailand: the River Basin
programme.desc: From manicured rice fields to wild tropical rainforests, the Mekong River is the source of life for eastern Thailand. Watch gibbons negotiate family dynamics, and see how the pit viper creates danger for the region’s delicate living networks.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Join anthropologist Jill Pruetz and guide Dondo (Johnny) Kanté and watch evolution happen in real time. Meet the elusive chimps of Fongoli, Senegal, who use tools, interact with fire, and adapt to the human world as it collides with their own.

programme.title: E1 - Earth
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of the Earth, where a drama is unfolding in real time. Meet animals, from tiny butterflies to huge humpback whales, that are acting as sentinels, adapting their behaviour, and helping us unlock the riddles of our changing planet.

programme.title: E2 - House Hunting Hermit Crabs
programme.desc: Get in line with hermit crabs for an orderly shell exchange on a Belize beach, then meet a Senegalese chimp’s pet genet. Float with an otter who swaps hostages for free meals and admire the agricultural prowess of leafcutter ants in the rainforest.

programme.title: E6 - Thailand: the River Basin
programme.desc: From manicured rice fields to wild tropical rainforests, the Mekong River is the source of life for eastern Thailand. Watch gibbons negotiate family dynamics, and see how the pit viper creates danger for the region’s delicate living networks.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Join anthropologist Jill Pruetz and guide Dondo (Johnny) Kanté and watch evolution happen in real time. Meet the elusive chimps of Fongoli, Senegal, who use tools, interact with fire, and adapt to the human world as it collides with their own.

programme.title: E1 - Earth
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of the Earth, where a drama is unfolding in real time. Meet animals, from tiny butterflies to huge humpback whales, that are acting as sentinels, adapting their behaviour, and helping us unlock the riddles of our changing planet.

programme.title: E3 - A New Zealand Christmas
programme.desc: See how one animal family’s tragedy is another’s holiday dinner as New Zealand’s mainland and island creatures, including penguins, flightless birds, sea lions, and sharks, battle to feed and protect their young in this marine environment.

programme.title: E6 - Thailand: the River Basin
programme.desc: From manicured rice fields to wild tropical rainforests, the Mekong River is the source of life for eastern Thailand. Watch gibbons negotiate family dynamics, and see how the pit viper creates danger for the region’s delicate living networks.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Join anthropologist Jill Pruetz and guide Dondo (Johnny) Kanté and watch evolution happen in real time. Meet the elusive chimps of Fongoli, Senegal, who use tools, interact with fire, and adapt to the human world as it collides with their own.

programme.title: E1 - Earth
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of the Earth, where a drama is unfolding in real time. Meet animals, from tiny butterflies to huge humpback whales, that are acting as sentinels, adapting their behaviour, and helping us unlock the riddles of our changing planet.

programme.title: E2 - House Hunting Hermit Crabs
programme.desc: Get in line with hermit crabs for an orderly shell exchange on a Belize beach, then meet a Senegalese chimp’s pet genet. Float with an otter who swaps hostages for free meals and admire the agricultural prowess of leafcutter ants in the rainforest.

programme.title: E5 - Episode 5
programme.desc: A curious raccoon sticks his head a little too far into a peanut butter jar on a sweltering summer day in Toronto. See how the team gets him out of this sticky situation. Then cheer on a painted turtle who needs emergency eye surgery.

programme.title: E5 - Boreal
programme.desc: Travel to the Arctic for a peek at the brutal challenges of life in the boreal forest, then admire some stellar animal adaptations. Witness a secret reindeer superpower, navigate a rodent labyrinth of snow, and learn why moose are gourmets at heart.

programme.title: E6 - Extreme
programme.desc: Learn how plants and animals tough it out in some of the driest terrain Earth has to offer. Run across thirsty trees that act as elephant signposts, see insects team up with plants for a chance at life, and get insight into natural chemical warfare.

programme.title: E2 - Living on the Edge

programme.desc: Lincoln is given the responsibility of taking home his classes’ tarantula, but it gets loose and wreaks havoc! // Thinking he has the worst chores, Lincoln decides to go on strike until someone will swap chores with him.

programme.title: E211 - The Library
programme.desc: Lily must retrieve a book from the dreaded library: a horrifying maze of unknown terrors. Can she and Jack escape alive?

programme.title: E108 - For Your Spies Only
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe attend Parent-Teacher Night, leaving Chloe and friends home without adult supervision. When Jinx finds the Air Lair, he believes spies are targeting the school, and his meddling puts the Thundermans' school jobs at risk.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 只有最頂層的0.1%人口可住在天空城堡——一個獨特的住宅社區。在上流社會的「SKY Castle」中更住著一群欲扶助丈夫事業和培育子女成為二代貴族的貴婦。然而，這些貴婦都有一個秘密不能告訴任何人。她們的財富、榮譽和最重要的權力鬥爭從現在開始！

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 只有最頂層的0.1%人口可住在天空城堡——一個獨特的住宅社區。在上流社會的「SKY Castle」中更住著一群欲扶助丈夫事業和培育子女成為二代貴族的貴婦。然而，這些貴婦都有一個秘密不能告訴任何人。她們的財富、榮譽和最重要的權力鬥爭從現在開始！

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.desc: Discover just how much cream it takes to make premium toffee; what ingredients make delectable vegan-friendly pesto; why five seconds can be the deciding factor in making the perfect cup of coffee; and what the connection is between ice rocket lollipops and Canadian birch trees.

programme.desc: Chef Edward Lee and Ryu Sooyoung embark on their final seasonal journey, beginning in Yangyang where native salmon return to spawn. Their adventure moves to Sokcho for yellowtail and Dokdo shrimp, before joining a gimbap picnic.

programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: E320
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.
